query:
SELECT
                        CASE
                            WHEN j.owner_id = $1 THEN $2::INTEGER
                            ELSE COALESCE(
                                 (SELECT jm.permissions
                                 FROM journal_members jm
                                 WHERE jm.journal_id = j.id AND jm.user_id = $1),
                                 0
                            )
                        END as "i32!"
                    FROM journals j
                    WHERE j.id = $3
